mapper.update: MERGE INTO TB_CM30M01 T USING DUAL ON (T.USER_ID = #{userId} AND T.PGM_ID = #{pgmId} AND T.GRID_ID = #{gridId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.COLUMN_CONFIG = #{columnConfig}, T.UDT_ID = #{userId}, T.UDT_PGM = #{reqPgm}, T.UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, PGM_ID, GRID_ID, COLUMN_CONFIG, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pgmId}, #{gridId}, #{columnConfig}, #{userId}, #{reqPgm}, SYSDATE)
